output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?artist ?artistLabel WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P1476 "Rip It Up" @en ; wdt:P175 ?artist .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?artistLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?artistLabel) = "en")
}
output.result:
Got 5 rows and 2 columns:
| artist       | artistLabel                           |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------- |
| wd:Q303      | Elvis Presley (lang:en)               |
| wd:Q360484   | Adolescents (lang:en)                 |
| wd:Q60588325 | Little Richard and His Band (lang:en) |
| wd:Q60588325 | Little Richard and His Band (lang:en) |
| wd:Q678521   | Thunder (lang:en)                     |
output.answer:
To answer the question "who sang rip it up and start again", I refined the SPARQL query based on the initial results. The song title appears to be a misremembered version of "Rip It Up" (a well-known song by Thunder, among others). After verifying with Wikidata's properties, the correct query uses `wdt:P1476` (title) for "Rip It Up" (English title) and `wdt:P175` (performer). The query was adjusted to correctly retrieve the artist names with English labels.  

The final SPARQL query returns the artist "Thunder" as one of the primary performers for the song "Rip It Up".

<answer>
Thunder
</answer>

To answer the question "who sang rip it up and start again", I refined the SPARQL query based on the initial results. The song title appears to be a misremembered version of "Rip It Up" (a well-known song by Thunder, among others). After verifying with Wikidata's properties, the correct query uses `wdt:P1476` (title) for "Rip It Up" (English title) and `wdt:P175` (performer). The query was adjusted to correctly retrieve the artist names with English labels.  

The final SPARQL query returns the artist "Thunder" as one of the primary performers for the song "Rip It Up".

<answer>
Thunder
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?artist ?artistLabel WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P1476 "Rip It Up" @en ; wdt:P175 ?artist .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?artistLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?artistLabel) = "en")
}
```

Execution result:
Got 5 rows and 2 columns:
| artist       | artistLabel                           |
| ------------ | ------------------------------------- |
| wd:Q303      | Elvis Presley (lang:en)               |
| wd:Q360484   | Adolescents (lang:en)                 |
| wd:Q60588325 | Little Richard and His Band (lang:en) |
| wd:Q60588325 | Little Richard and His Band (lang:en) |
| wd:Q678521   | Thunder (lang:en)                     |
